title: Phyllanthus dunnianus
taxonomy: Phyllanthus dunnianus is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a type of flowering plant and is classified within the kingdom Plantae. The species is part of the genus Phyllanthus, which is a group of plants native to tropical and subtropical regions. Phyllanthus dunnianus is further classified into the order Malpighiales, which includes various flowering plants. The specific classification of Phyllanthus dunnianus is Phyllanthus dunnianus (J.F.Mill.) H.H.Irvine.
